name: wd041216-bit--openclaw-free-web-search
description: Free, private, real-time web search for OpenClaw — zero API keys required. Powered by self-hosted SearXNG + Scrapling anti-bot engine. Multi-engine parallel search (Bing/DuckDuckGo/Google/Startpage/Qwant), intent-aware Agent Reach query expansion, three-tier Browse/Viewing (Fetcher → StealthyFetcher → DynamicFetcher for Cloudflare/JS sites), cross-engine anti-hallucination validation, and automatic public fallback.
